title: Sailor's Luck
writer: Bert Hanlon, Charlotte Miller, Marguerite Roberts
actors: James Dunn, Sally Eilers, Victor Jory
plot: On shore leave in San Pedro, U.S. sailor Jimmy Harrigan meets and falls for Sally Brent. She promises to wait for him when he ships out to San Francisco, but Jimmy becomes jealous and tells her off when he learns that she has ente...
